entries.notes: Verified all 14 FH5 barn find car names. Previous data had wrong/non-existent cars (Porsche 968 Turbo S, Peel P50, Mercury Cougar Eliminator, etc.). Replaced with verified names: BMW 2002 Turbo 1973, Chevrolet Corvette 1953, Dodge Dart Hemi Super Stock 1968, Dodge Viper GTS ACR 1999, Ferrari 250 GTO 1962, Ferrari F40 Competizione 1989, Ford F-100 1956, Ford Mustang GT 2+2 Fastback 1968, Ford Racing Escort MK1 1967, GMC Jimmy 1970, Jaguar Sport XJR-15 1991, Porsche 911 Carrera RS 1973, Renault 4L Export 1968, Toyota #1 T100 Baja Truck 1993.

All 50 placeholder coordinates replaced with map-image-calibrated estimates. Methodology: viewed 4000x2394 fh5-mexico.jpg and cross-referenced with FH5 geography (La Gran Caldera ~x39 y22, Guanajuato ~x67 y14, Playa Azul ~x87 y70, El Estadio ~x52 y38). Coordinates are approximate — use the MapGenie Helper tool in the app to calibrate with precision from mapgenie.io/forza-horizon-5/maps/mexico. All automated scraping of MapGenie/IGN failed (JS-rendered maps). API path bug also fixed: route.ts was reading from nonexistent app/location-finder/data/ path, now correctly reads public/data/fh5-locations.json.
Repair run: 1 hue-range fixes, 67 zero-color1 inferred, 383 null-color2 derived, 10 zero-color2 derived, 86 duplicates removed. 11886 entries remain.
